steps.title: Find z
steps.content: First, 55% less than 50 means subtract 55% of 50 from 50. In decimal form, 55% = 0.55, so $$z = 50 \times (1 - 0.55) = 50 \times 0.45 = 22.5$$.

steps.title: Find w
steps.content: The number w is 110% greater than z, meaning $w = z + 110\% \text{ of } z = z \times (1 + 1.10)$. Substitute z = 22.5: $$w = 22.5 \times (1 + 1.10) = 22.5 \times 2.10 = 47.25 = \frac{189}{4}$$ The answer is 189/4.
